subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

We would be happy to arrange an introductory call. The following slots work well on our end:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which date suits you best, and we will send a calendar invitation with meeting details.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal personnel contact information. I would suggest referring to our public website for any available contact channels, or we can ensure the right stakeholders are included once the introductory call is scheduled.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
